problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Combining Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
